query: Help me write a PRD for my new grocery-budgeting app.
Update the PRD to add an offline-mode requirement.
Validate my PRD and tell me what's missing before we hand it to architecture.
I need a one-page product brief to pitch this idea, nothing as heavy as a full PRD.
Break the PRD requirements into epics and a list of user stories.
Create the technical architecture and solution design from this PRD.
